materials.name: Borated coolant/moderator at HZP 565 K (VERA Problem 4)
Borated Water Coolant — Pyrex Edge Assembly Guide Tubes
corner assembly guide thimble plug (304 stainless steel)
Thimble plug (Type 304 stainless steel) - edge assemblies
Borated Water Coolant – Edge Assembly Thimble Plug Region (HZP, 565 K, 1300 ppm B)

assumptions: Base operating state selected: RCCA poison bottom at z=257.9 cm as the primary modeling case
Recommended RCCA upper endplug (~1.90 cm solid SS304) is an explicit approximation, not uniquely specified in the original benchmark
Structural alloys (Zircaloy-4, SS304, Inconel-718) must use true isotopic compositions; pure-element approximations must be flagged as low-fidelity
Inter-assembly water gap is 0.08 cm total (0.04 cm half-gap per assembly side) filled with borated water
Nozzle and core plate regions replace the entire 3×3 cross-section with homogenized slabs; detailed 17×17 lattice is not retained in these axial zones
Spacer grids are modeled as mass-conserving outer frame overlays that do not cut through fuel rods, guide tubes, or instrument tubes
content.boundary_scope: Radial outer surfaces of entire 3×3 region are reflective; axial top (z=463.937 cm) and bottom (z=-55.0 cm) are vacuum; interfaces between nine assemblies are transmission boundaries.

fuel_variant_requirements.source_note: VERA Problem 4 Table P4-2: U-235 2.1100 wt%, U-234 0.0174%, U-236 0.0097%, U-238 97.8629%; used in 4 corner (C) and 1 center RCCA (R) assemblies
VERA Problem 4 Table P4-2: U-235 2.6190 wt%, U-234 0.0219%, U-236 0.0120%, U-238 97.3471%; used in 4 edge (E) assemblies

localized_insert_requirements.source_note: §13: Pyrex annular poison in 20 of 24 guide tubes per E assembly; poison segment 15.761–376.441 cm, upper He plenum 376.441–397.510 cm; remaining 4 guide tubes hold thimble plugs
§14: SS304 solid thimble plug in all 24 guide tubes of each C assembly; plug spans 383.310–394.310 cm
§6.4/§14: 4 of 24 guide tubes in each E assembly hold thimble plugs at coordinates (6,6),(6,12),(12,6),(12,12); plug spans 383.310–394.310 cm

§15: 24 RCCA rodlets in center R assembly guide tubes; AIC bottom 101.60 cm + B4C 259.08 cm + He plenum 10.70 cm + endplug ~1.90 cm; base case poison bottom z=257.9 cm; all 24 rodlets move rigidly together

missing_facts: Operating state selection template was empty; base case (z_bottom=257.9 cm) assumed as primary variant
Helium density not specified in benchmark; must use nominal library value with source annotation
RCCA upper endplug is an explicit approximation (~1.90 cm) noted in assumptions, not a uniquely specified benchmark detail
source_notes: VERA Core Physics Benchmark Problems, CASL-U-2012-0131-004, Problem #4
All quantitative values extracted directly from the problem specification sections §1–§24
content.symmetry_description: Full 3×3 model with no symmetry reduction. Reflective boundaries only on the outer 3×3 region faces, not on inter-assembly interfaces.

assumptions: Operating state: BOL (beginning of life) / HZP (hot zero power) at 565 K isothermal conditions; no burnup or thermal-hydraulic feedback calculated
Power level: 0% FP for all states; HZP condition with 1360 ppm soluble boron at 2250 psia
Base operating state selected: RCCA poison bottom at z=257.9 cm as the primary modeling case
Recommended RCCA upper endplug (~1.90 cm solid SS304) is an explicit approximation, not uniquely specified in the original benchmark
Structural alloys (Zircaloy-4, SS304, Inconel-718) must use true isotopic compositions; pure-element approximations must be flagged as low-fidelity
Inter-assembly water gap is 0.08 cm total (0.04 cm half-gap per assembly side) filled with borated water
Nozzle and core plate regions replace the entire 3×3 cross-section with homogenized slabs; detailed 17×17 lattice is not retained in these axial zones
Spacer grids are modeled as mass-conserving outer frame overlays that do not cut through fuel rods, guide tubes, or instrument tubes
content.boundary_scope: Radial outer surfaces of entire 3×3 region are reflective; axial top (z=463.937 cm) and bottom (z=-55.0 cm) are vacuum; interfaces between nine assemblies are transmission boundaries.

fuel_variant_requirements.source_note: VERA Problem 4 Table P4-2: U-235 2.1100 wt%, U-234 0.0174%, U-236 0.0097%, U-238 97.8629%; used in 4 corner (C) and 1 center RCCA (R) assemblies
VERA Problem 4 Table P4-2: U-235 2.6190 wt%, U-234 0.0219%, U-236 0.0120%, U-238 97.3471%; used in 4 edge (E) assemblies

localized_insert_requirements.source_note: §13: Pyrex annular poison in 20 of 24 guide tubes per E assembly; poison segment 15.761–376.441 cm, upper He plenum 376.441–397.510 cm; remaining 4 guide tubes hold thimble plugs
§14: SS304 solid thimble plug in all 24 guide tubes of each C assembly; plug spans 383.310–394.310 cm
§6.4/§14: 4 of 24 guide tubes in each E assembly hold thimble plugs at coordinates (6,6),(6,12),(12,6),(12,12); plug spans 383.310–394.310 cm

§15: 24 RCCA rodlets in center R assembly guide tubes; AIC bottom 101.60 cm + B4C 259.08 cm + He plenum 10.70 cm + endplug ~1.90 cm; base case poison bottom z=257.9 cm; all 24 rodlets move rigidly together

missing_facts: Operating state selection template was empty; base case (z_bottom=257.9 cm) assumed as primary variant
Helium density not specified in benchmark; must use nominal library value with source annotation
RCCA upper endplug is an explicit approximation (~1.90 cm) noted in assumptions, not a uniquely specified benchmark detail
source_notes: VERA Core Physics Benchmark Problems, CASL-U-2012-0131-004, Problem #4
All quantitative values extracted directly from the problem specification sections §1–§24
Operating conditions: BOL/HZP at 565 K isothermal, 0% FP, 2250 psia, 1360 ppm soluble boron; no burnup or thermal-hydraulic feedback (§1, §4)
Localized insert counts from §6.5: Pyrex paths = 4×20 = 80; thimble-plug paths = 4×24 + 4×4 = 112; RCCA rodlet paths = 1×24 = 24
Spacer grid count from §11: 8 grids per assembly × 9 assemblies = 72 total (18 end grids + 54 middle grids)
content.symmetry_description: Full 3×3 model with no symmetry reduction. Reflective boundaries only on the outer 3×3 region faces, not on inter-assembly interfaces.

normalized_state.requirement_text: [REDACTED: VERA4 Phase 8C Step 3C MU replay fixture]

findings.message: Coverage contract row for region_2_2p619 used the Region 1 material instead of the Region 2 material.
Edge thimble-plug role contract required unnecessary edge-specific material identity.
fuel_pin universe has no background cell
Recorded reviewer interpreted the first material_id slot across universes as conflicting roles.
Recorded reviewer interpreted unique material_ids count as needing to equal cell_count.

recorded_reviews.concise_summary: Recorded v13 binding scope had no distinct finding.
